title: My AI Memory Now Follows Me Across Every Tool!
summary: Walrus Memory is a memory layer that persists context outside individual AI agents and enables context sharing across different providers. It encrypts memories before storage and gives users control over which agents can access them. Setup requires only a single prompt.
